name: AynOps
description: A Model Context Protocol server that gives Claude real-time cybersecurity reconnaissance capabilities — WHOIS, DNS enumeration, port scanning, SSL inspection, CVE lookup, IP reputation, ASN lookup and more.
author: Gaohar Imran

tools.name: whois_lookup
tools.description: Query domain registration data — owner, registrar, creation date, expiry, name servers

tools.name: dns_enumeration
tools.description: Enumerate DNS records and brute-force common subdomains

tools.name: port_scan
tools.description: Nmap-powered port scanner with service and version detection

tools.name: ssl_inspect
tools.description: Inspect SSL/TLS certificate — issuer, expiry, cipher, SANs, TLS version

tools.name: tech_stack_detect
tools.description: Fingerprint web server, CMS, CDN, JS frameworks, and security headers

tools.name: cert_transparency
tools.description: Subdomain discovery and Certificate Transparency logs with an automatic fallback to HackerTarget passive DNS on timeouts

tools.name: asn_lookup
tools.description: Find ASN, ISP, organization and geolocation for any IP or domain

tools.name: full_recon
tools.description: Runs core tools in parallel against a domain and returns combined results

tools.name: cve_lookup
tools.description: Search NVD database for known CVEs by software name and version

tools.name: ip_reputation
tools.description: Check if an IP address is flagged as malicious via AbuseIPDB

environment_variables.name: ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Required for ip_reputation tool. Get free key at abuseipdb.com

environment_variables.name: IP_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Required for asn_lookup tool. Get free key at ipapi.com
